market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Family Getaway: 5 Bedrooms, Van Parking, Sleeps 9
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to Minstead Houses, an entire 5‑bedroom home designed for families or groups seeking a comfortable stay near local parks. The property comfortably accommodates up to 4 guests, offering four private bedrooms and a shared living space. Each bedroom is furnished with quality bedding and storage, while the living area provides a welcoming environment for relaxation after a day of exploring. 

The home boasts a fully equipped kitchen where you can prepare meals, and a dining area that seats everyone together. Enjoy the convenience of on‑site parking with space for two vans, making arrivals and departures hassle‑free. Although the listing does not currently highlight outdoor or entertainment amenities, the surrounding area includes several parks within walking distance, perfect for picnics or outdoor activities. 

Priced at £956.80 per night, Minstead Houses delivers a premium experience, though we recommend reviewing the rate to align with market expectations and improve booking rates. With a current 90‑day occupancy of only 14.1%, there is significant opportunity to attract more guests by adjusting pricing and highlighting any added amenities. Book your stay and experience the spacious comfort of Minstead Houses in a convenient location.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking for two vans clearly highlighted
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a clear exterior shot showing the house and the two van parking spaces as the cover photo; it instantly conveys the unique parking advantage.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £956.8 – it is 519% higher than the city median of £154.60, which is driving low bookings (only 14.1% occupancy).
Add and highlight high‑value amenities (outdoor area, parking, entertainment) to meet guest expectations and improve perceived value.
Refresh the listing description and title to accurately reflect the capacity (4 guests) and unique features, correcting misleading information that may deter bookings.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your current occupancy is just 14% despite a nightly rate that's 519% above the market median, indicating a massive pricing gap.
